family_summary: Conflict-family bundle spanning the October 7 attack, successive Gaza campaign phases, ceasefire periods, and later residual violence.
notes: Quantitative estimates in the final open episode are right-censored at the latest near-present sources located in this session (through 2026-02-25 for the best Palestinian killed-since-ceasefire count). Whole-country denominators are deliberately rejected. A March 2026 mortality-classification audit separates deaths, injuries, total casualties, indirect deaths, excess-death contexts, and mixed or unclassified mortality reporting; only explicit direct violent deaths remain in the baseline DR numerator.
